name: com.52choujiang/xhs-insights
title: SocialDataX 小红书 Xiaohongshu XHS RedNote MCP
description: Read-only 小红书 / Xiaohongshu / XHS / RedNote MCP for filtered note search, search hot list, details, comments, comment replies, creator profiles, and creator notes.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer API key from SocialDataX / 社媒数据助手

tools.name: xhs_search_notes
tools.description: Search Xiaohongshu / 小红书 notes by keyword with optional sort, note type, and publish-time filters.

tools.name: xhs_get_search_hot_list
tools.description: Get the Xiaohongshu / 小红书 search hot list with each item's title and heat value.

tools.name: xhs_get_note_detail_by_note_url
tools.description: Resolve a shared XHS link, short link, or share text into structured note details.

tools.name: xhs_get_note_detail_by_note_id
tools.description: Fetch structured note details when the caller already has a note ID.

tools.name: xhs_get_note_comments_by_note_id
tools.description: Fetch paginated first-level comments when the caller already has a note ID.

tools.name: xhs_get_note_comments_by_note_url
tools.description: Fetch paginated first-level comments directly from a shared note URL, short link, or share text.

tools.name: xhs_get_note_sub_comments_by_comment_id
tools.description: Fetch paginated replies under a first-level comment by note ID and comment ID.

tools.name: xhs_get_user_info_by_user_id
tools.description: Fetch creator profile data when the caller already has a user ID.

tools.name: xhs_get_user_info_by_profile_url
tools.description: Resolve a profile link, short link, or share text into creator profile data.

tools.name: xhs_get_user_posted_notes_by_user_id
tools.description: Fetch a paginated list of notes published by a creator when the caller already has a user ID.

tools.name: xhs_get_user_posted_notes_by_profile_url
tools.description: Fetch a paginated list of notes published by a creator from a profile link, short link, or share text.
